title: Converge stale task projections and terminal cleanup
goal: Implement projection convergence so real terminal task outcomes release operational claims and leave historical evidence while interrupted or unknown outcomes remain visible.

approval.note: User explicitly authorized full registration and implementation on 2026-07-18; live-state, claims, diff review, CI, merge and runtime evidence remain mandatory.

acceptance.assertion: Completed, failed and explicitly abandoned current attempts leave active projections after authoritative reconciliation.
Interrupted and outcome-unknown records are not silently treated as running or safely retryable.
Only terminal receipt-bound current attempts release exact unchanged task leases.
Tests cover stale running projections, retries, same-second races, resumed attempts and foreign-owner leases.

does_not_establish: authority outside the listed source systems
